description_long: This is an elegant, vintage-style armchair featuring a rounded, oval backrest and a generously cushioned seat, both upholstered in a soft, muted blue fabric. The frame is crafted from carved wood with a natural finish, showcasing intricate detailing along the arms, legs, and seat border. The armrests are partially padded and upholstered to match the seat and back, providing both comfort and visual continuity. The legs are slender, fluted, and slightly tapered, ending in decorative carved feet. The back of the chair reveals the wooden frame and a fabric panel, highlighting the craftsmanship. This armchair exudes a classic, refined aesthetic suitable for upscale urban interiors or outdoor seating in parks and boulevards.
description: A vintage-style armchair with a carved wooden frame and blue upholstered seat and back, featuring padded armrests and decorative detailing.
description_view_0: Front view shows the oval backrest, wide cushioned seat, and padded armrests with carved wooden frame.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the chair's depth, the curve of the backrest, and the padded armrest profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the exposed wooden frame and fabric panel on the backrest, with detailed leg carvings visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the armrest padding and the elegant curve of the backrest and seat.
attribute_armrest_design: partially padded and upholstered, carved wooden frame, gently curved
attribute_backrest_style: oval, medium-high, upholstered with visible wooden frame and decorative beading
attribute_leg_type: slender, fluted, carved wooden legs with decorative feet
